Component.Name: PlannerCodeGridCol
Component.Caption: sPlannerCode
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLItems( PROPERTIES(PlanCode) DISPLAY(1)DISTINCT() FILTER(plan_code is not null)ORDERBY(PlanCode))

ActiveXComponentProperty.Properties: <chart showValue="0" valueAbovePointer="1" pointerOnTop="1" showShadow="0" showTickMarks="1" showTickValues="1" ticksBelowGauge="1" showGaugeLabels="1" gaugeFillMix="{color}" showGaugeBorder="1" is3D="0" bgAlpha="0" showBorder="0" baseFont="Arial" captionOnTop="1" captionFontBold="1" subCaptionFontBold="1" alignCaptionWithCanvas="1" />

<chart showValue="0" valueAbovePointer="1" pointerOnTop="1" showShadow="0" showTickMarks="1" showTickValues="1" ticksBelowGauge="1" showGaugeLabels="1" gaugeFillMix="{color}" showGaugeBorder="1" is3D="0" bgAlpha="0" showBorder="0" baseFont="Arial" captionOnTop="1" captionFontBold="1" subCaptionFontBold="1" alignCaptionWithCanvas="1"><colorRange><color maxValue="10" code="#F44336" /><color minValue="10" maxValue="15" code="#FFC107" /><color minValue="15" code="#4CAF50" /></colorRange></chart>

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On_x0D_ Option Strict On_x0D_ _x0D_ Imports System_x0D_ Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic_x0D_ Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol_x0D_ Imports Mongoose.Scripting_x0D_ _x0D_ Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts_x0D_ Public Class EvHandler_StdFormPredisplay_0_x0D_ Inherits GlobalScript_x0D_ _x0D_ Sub Main()_x0D_ ThisForm.Variables("WildcardVar").Value = Application.WildcardCharacter_x0D_ End Sub_x0D_ End Class_x0D_ End Namespace_x0D_ )

Variable.Name: cds_dataView1_SITE
Variable.Value: dataview( DATAVIEWMODE(PREDEFINED) DATAVIEWNAME(HIL Requested Date Check) DATAVIEWLAYOUT(Achieve Due Date) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_dataView2_SITE
Variable.Value: dataview( DATAVIEWMODE(PREDEFINED) DATAVIEWNAME(HIL Component Shortages APS Report) DATAVIEWDRILLPARM1(FG) DATAVIEWDRILLPARM2(FG) DATAVIEWDRILLPARM8(CURDATE(7)) DATAVIEWLAYOUT(HIL_FramesShort) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge1_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(132) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(144) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge10_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(B-BLD) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge11_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(B-WLD) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge12_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(H-GNDF) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge13_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(H-WLD) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge14_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(H-BLD) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge15_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(KIT) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge16_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(B-GND) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge17_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(FA) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge18_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(PNT) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge19_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(H-GNDC) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge2_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(133) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(145) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge20_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(167) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge21_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(H-FWLD) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge22_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(137) GAUGEGROUP(H-RBT) GAUGEDATERANGE(Today) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge23_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(173) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEAUTOMATICREFRESHINTERVAL(5) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge3_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(127) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(140) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge4_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(128) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(141) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge5_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(129) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(142) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge6_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(131) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(143) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge7_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(131) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(143) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge8_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(134) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEDRILLDOWN(146) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) )

Variable.Name: cds_gauge9_SITE
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECRITICALNUMBER(166) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Short) GAUGEGOALVALUE(0) GAUGEALERTVALUE(1) )

Variable.Name: cds_LateOrdersChart
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(COBar, FCSTBar, PROJBar, TRNSBar, MPSBar, SSBar, PSBar, JOBBar) LEGENDS(sCO, sFCST, sPROJ, sTRNS, sMPS, sSS, sPS, sJOB) RENDERASLIST(, , , , , , , ) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) CHARTBINDTOCURRENTROW(1))

Variable.Name: cew_GotoConsolidatedPlanMenuItem
Variable.Value: Enabled:#C(GotoConsolidatedPlanMenuItem), #P(IsConsolidatedPLN) = "1", "True"

Variable.Name: cew_PlanCodeGridCol
Variable.Value: Enabled:#C(PlanCodeGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_66540ActiveVar) = 1, "True"

Variable.Name: cew_PlannerCodeGridCol
Variable.Value: Enabled:#C(PlannerCodeGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_66540ActiveVar) = 0, "True"

Variable.Name: cvw_PlanCodeGridCol
Variable.Value: Visible:#C(PlanCodeGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_66540ActiveVar) = 1, "True"

Variable.Name: cvw_PlannerCodeGridCol
Variable.Value: Visible:#C(PlannerCodeGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_66540ActiveVar) = 0, "True"

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLDemandSummaries.CLM_ApsGetDemandSummarySp( V(fds1_PrimaryMethodParms) ORDERBY(Item,Lateness ASC) LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SLResourceGroupUtilizations.CLM_ApsGetSchedResGrpUtilSp( V(fds1_SecCol2MethodParms) CA(RVOG) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( ue_HIL_APS_Diagnostics( CA(RNCSDVIOG) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC4
Variable.Value: OBJECT4( [New]( CA(RNCSDVIOG) ) )

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(StartDateVar), VAR V(EndDateVar), VAR CO, VAR V(FilterDemandIdVar), VAR V(FilterItemVar), VAR V(FilterCustomerVar), VAR V(FilterLatenessVar), VAR V(CriticalItemVar), VAR V(ShowPLNVar), VAR FG, VAR V(WildcardVar), VAR V(AltNo), VAR V(FilterString))

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol2MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(AltNo), VAR V(StartDateVar), VAR V(IntervalCountVar), VAR V(IntervalTypeVar), VAR 0, VAR V(RGIDVar), VAR 0, VAR V(GroupAllocOnlyVar), VAR V(WildcardVar), VAR V(vApsGetSchedResGrpUtilFilterString))

Variable.Name: InitialCommand
Variable.Value: Refresh

Variable.Name: IntervalTypeVar
Variable.Value: ~LIT~()

Variable.Name: LoadProfileRGID
Variable.Value: ~LIT~()

Variable.Name: lse_DemandTypeGridCol
Variable.Value: 1\sOrdTypeCO,2\sOrdTypeFCST,3\sOrdTypePROJ,4\sOrdTypeTRNS,5\sOrdTypeMPS,6\sOrdTypeSSD,7\sOrdTypePS,8\sOrdTypePPS,9\sOrdTypeJOB,10\sOrdTypePJOB

Variable.Name: lse_StatusGridCol
Variable.Value: CP\sCoitemStatus=P,CO\sCoitemStatus=O,CF\sCoitemStatus=F,CC\sCoitemStatus=C,JF\sJobStatus=F,JR\sJobStatus=R,JS\sJobStatus=S,JC\sJobStatus=C,JH\sJobStatus=H,PA\sActive,PI\sInactive,PC\sComplete,PH\sHistory,PE\sEstimate,TO\sOrdered,TT\sTransit,TC\sComplete

Variable.Name: lsm1_DemandIdGridCol
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(DemandType), VAR C(AltNoEdit), VAR P(DemandId))

Variable.Name: lsm1_ItemGridCol
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(AltNoEdit), VAR P(Item))

Variable.Name: RGIDVar
Variable.Value: ~LIT~(*LB)

Variable.Name: test
Variable.Value: ~LIT~()

Variable.Name: TodayVar
Variable.Value: CURDATE(0)

Variable.Name: ue_DiagMsg
Variable.Value: ~LIT~(asd)

Variable.Name: vApsGetSchedResGrpUtilFilterString
Variable.Value: ~LIT~()

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: ' Force the UI to refresh if the variable is bound to a component
' Method to bulk-load diagnostics for every row in the grid
' 2. Loop through every record currently in the grid
' 4. FIX: Use Me.IDOClient (Property of the FormScript base class)
' 5. FIX: Use standard SetObjectProperty and clear the modified flag
' Clear the column if the plan version doesn't match (Kill-Switch)
' 2) Date as ISO string (avoid locale issues when passing to IDOs/SPs)
' Many APS methods treat these as flags, so "1"/"0" is safest.
' If your method expects "True"/"False", switch to CStr(True)/CStr(False).
' (Optional) Call your refresh event from here too
' Prefer an event that runs REFRESH COLLECTIONS(objects23)
' Error (1) if criteria not properly specified
If ThisForm.Variables("StartDateVar").Value <> "" Then ' Start Date can be blank
If ThisForm.Variables("EndDateVar").Value <> "" Then ' End Date can be blank
'SetVariableValue: Handle setting AltNo variable from Filter-In-Place
' Error (1) if criteria not properly specified
Sub SetPLNNumber(demandtype As String, orderid As String)
